description_long: This is a military-style flight helmet featuring a hard, rounded white shell with a dark, full-face visor integrated into the front. Attached to the lower front is a green oxygen mask with a flexible, ribbed breathing hose extending from the mask and looping around the helmet. The helmet has a chin strap with a padded section and metal fasteners for secure attachment. On the rear, there are several small circular ports and a blue circular component, likely for communication or ventilation. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external decoration and a focus on protection and functionality.
description: A white military flight helmet with a dark visor, green oxygen mask, and ribbed breathing hose, featuring a utilitarian design with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark visor, green oxygen mask, and the ribbed breathing hose attached to the mask.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the smooth white shell, blue circular component, and the attachment points of the hose and chin strap.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the helmet's rounded back, small circular ports, and the coiled hose extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the blue circular component, chin strap, and the connection of the breathing hose to the mask.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Three small circular vents on the rear upper left and right sides, and one larger blue circular port on the lower rear center.
